untranslatable_reason: Signal requires Point and Figure column-based logic and swing state tracking (current swing direction, swing high/low persistence across columns) which cannot be expressed in bar-by-bar indicator comparisons. The 'swing_filter_value' parameter is author-silent and undefined. The rule requires maintaining swing state and multi-column logic incompatible with standard OHLC bar analysis.
translation_notes: This is a classic Kaufman Point and Figure pattern that requires columnar state management. The logic cannot be translated to standard technical indicators without: (1) explicit swing_filter_value definition, (2) multi-bar column tracking, and (3) swing direction state variables. A backtest engine would need P&F-specific logic rather than indicator conditions.
